metadata.description: Claude Cowork Bootcamp 2.0 — All session plugins, bonuses, and tools. 6 sessions, 70+ skills.

plugins.name: file-master
plugins.description: Organize, ingest, search, and track files in your Coworker workspace. Session 1 plugin.

plugins.name: content-creator
plugins.description: Write content for any platform — newsletters, LinkedIn, Twitter, YouTube, Substack Notes. Includes video creation with Remotion. Session 2 plugin.

plugins.name: voice-lab
plugins.description: Train your AI to write like you — Voice DNA, archetypes, vocabulary, sentence patterns, quirks, tone grid, and Voice Template compilation.

plugins.name: repurposer
plugins.description: Extract short-form social content from long-form newsletters. Substack Notes, LinkedIn posts, Twitter threads, social hooks.

plugins.name: meeting-to-content
plugins.description: Turn today's meetings into content. Extracts insights from transcripts, interviews you about the best angles, drafts posts in your voice.

plugins.name: ai-hunter-v2
plugins.description: Detect and fix AI patterns in your writing. Surgical rewrites with before/after verification.
